allow: Bash(timeout 120 python -m pytest tests/unit/ -m unit -p no:warnings --tb=line)
Bash(timeout 120 python -m pytest tests/unit/ -m unit -p no:warnings --tb=short)
Bash(timeout 120 python -m pytest tests/unit/ -m unit -p no:warnings --tb=no)
Bash(python -c "import codex_core.dev.check_runner; import inspect; src = inspect.getsource\(codex_core.dev.check_runner.BaseCheckRunner\); print\(src\)")
Bash(python -c "from tools.dev.check import CheckRunner; import inspect; print\(inspect.getsource\(CheckRunner.run_all\)\)")
Bash(timeout 120 python -m pytest tests/unit/ -m unit -p no:warnings --tb=no --co -q)
